business.name: Allan Appliance Repair Services
business.tagline: The appliance repair Cincinnati calls first

hero.headline: *Same-day fixes* — no waiting around
hero.subheadline: Your washer quits, your dryer won't dry, your fridge runs warm — we show up fast and fix it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every problem
services_section.subheading: From ice makers to washing machines — we diagnose fast and repair it right

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Won't spin, won't drain, won't dry — we've seen it all and fixed it all.

services.title: Refrigerator Service
services.description: Running warm, making noise, ice maker broken — back to keeping things cold.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Not cleaning, not draining, not starting — get back to spotless dishes.

services.title: Range & Oven Repair
services.description: Burners not heating, oven temperature off — cooking made simple again.

about.heading: One call fixes it all
about.body: Cincinnati appliance repair team that shows up when we say we will. Real person answers the phone, same person comes to your door.

reviews.name: Lindsey H.
reviews.text: Allan came out right away and found the problem immediately. So friendly and very professional — highly recommend him.

reviews.name: Chris M.
reviews.text: Couldn't have been more pleased. He was responsive, knowledgeable, and a pleasure to work with. Same day service and had it fixed by the next morning.

reviews.name: Bobby H.
reviews.text: Scheduled two days out, arrived promptly and had my icemaker fixed in an hour. Really knows what he's doing and prices fairly.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Cincinnati
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across the metro area

cta.heading: Appliance broke? We'll fix it today
cta.body: No waiting weeks for a repair appointment. Call now and we'll diagnose the problem and give you an honest quote — usually same day.
